TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Piyuma, title = Piyuma, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Piyuma} }

S.FORM: Piyuma Itiniay i Taiwu Cen no Pingtung ko Piyuma a niyaro', 168 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 716 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 98% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 702 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 2% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 14 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan93%, Amis1%, roma3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: pijo~u~uma itiniaj i taiwo~u~u ¶…ôn no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u pijo~u~uma a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan**%, amis*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Piyuma Itiniay i Taiwu Cen no Pingtung ko Piyuma a niyaro', 168 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 716 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 98% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 702 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 2% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 14 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan93%, Amis1%, roma3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: pijo~u~uma itiniaj i taiwo~u~u ¶…ôn no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u pijo~u~uma a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan**%, amis*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
